description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular form. The front facade features a combination of gray and wood-textured panels, with large windows and a prominent entryway that includes a small overhang and steps leading up to the door. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious balcony or deck area, enclosed by horizontal slat railings. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and smaller, more functional ones distributed across the exterior. The house sits on a raised foundation with a landscaped border, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and contemporary materials. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and wood, with metal accents on railings and entry features.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of gray and wood-textured panels. Features include a prominent front entry with steps, a rear balcony, and minimalist, clean-lined architecture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, a small overhang, large windows, and a landscaped border.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid gray wall, a single window, and the extended rear balcony with horizontal slat railings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spacious balcony, multiple doors and windows, and the continuation of the wood-textured paneling.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a mostly solid gray wall, a single window, and the balcony extending from the rear.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and smaller functional windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a single door with a small overhang, steps, and a landscaped border, accented by a large window and minimalist detailing.
